# Debt Settlement vs Bankruptcy -- Which Is Better? Honest Comparison [2026]
> Debt settlement vs bankruptcy: compare success rates, tax consequences, credit impact, and total cost. Unbiased 2026 comparison.

## About
debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Debt Settlement vs Bankruptcy: The Full Head-to-Head Comparison (2026): https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/comparison.html
- Credit Score: Settlement vs Bankruptcy: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/credit-impact.html
- FAQ -- Debt Settlement vs Bankruptcy: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/faq.html
- How Debt Settlement Actually Works: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/how-settlement-works.html
- Debt Settlement vs Bankruptcy -- Which Is Better? Honest Comparison: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/
- Debt Settlement Scams to Avoid: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/scam-warning.html
- What Debt Settlement Companies Charge: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/settlement-fees.html
- The 1099-C Tax Bomb from Debt Settlement: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/tax-bomb.html
- Timeline: Settlement vs Bankruptcy: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/timeline.html
- When Settlement Fails -- And Bankruptcy Saves You: https://debtsettlementvsbankruptcy.com/when-settlement-fails.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
